reasoning.title: Reasoning Gauntlet
reasoning.blurb: Abstract, symbolic, causal and compositional reasoning; hidden-rule induction; adversarial logic; minimal-example generalization.

math.title: Mathematics Gauntlet
math.blurb: Competition and research-style math: algebra, number theory, combinatorics, geometry, probability, proofs and counterexamples.

science.title: Science Gauntlet
science.blurb: Graduate-level scientific reasoning, experiment critique, causal inference, statistical interpretation and conflicting-evidence resolution.

code.title: Code & Software Engineering Gauntlet
code.blurb: Real bug fixing, multi-file repos, hidden unit tests, performance and security hardening, refactoring and code review.

agent.title: Agentic Autonomy Gauntlet
agent.blurb: Long-horizon planning, tool-use, multi-step execution, policy adherence, state tracking and recovery from errors.

multimodal.title: Multimodal Gauntlet
multimodal.blurb: Charts, tables, diagrams, documents, screenshots and figures; cross-modal reasoning and contradiction detection.

truthfulness.title: Truthfulness & Calibration Gauntlet
truthfulness.blurb: False-premise detection, impossible questions, fake-citation traps, uncertain knowledge, source conflict and abstention quality.

safety.title: Safety & Robustness Gauntlet
safety.blurb: Prompt-injection resistance, instruction-hierarchy compliance, sycophancy, privacy boundaries, refusal precision and adversarial paraphrase consistency.

memory.title: Memory & Context Gauntlet
memory.blurb: Long-context recall, cross-document synthesis, contradiction tracking, needle-in-haystack with distractors and context compression.

strategy.title: Strategy & Decision-Making Gauntlet
strategy.blurb: Business reasoning, resource allocation, risk assessment, forecasting and tradeoff analysis under uncertainty.

creativity.title: Creativity & Synthesis Gauntlet
creativity.blurb: Original synthesis, design reasoning, constraint satisfaction, critique and revision, and creative problem solving.

meta_learning.title: Meta-Learning & Adaptation Gauntlet
meta_learning.blurb: Learning a novel rule system inside the task, adapting after feedback, few-shot transfer, self-correction and strategy shift.

jailbreak_resistance.title: Jailbreak Resistance Gauntlet
jailbreak_resistance.blurb: Tests whether a model correctly refuses disallowed requests delivered via direct jailbreaks, roleplay persona escapes, fake authority pressure, emotional manipulation, obfuscation/encoding tricks, multi-step bypasses, and benign-wrapper disguises.

tool_safety.title: Tool Safety Gauntlet
tool_safety.blurb: Tests whether a model respects tool authorization boundaries: refusing unauthorized tool calls, requiring confirmations before destructive actions, detecting tool-output injection, avoiding excessive agency, and preventing data exfiltration via tool chaining.

privacy_security.title: Privacy & Security Gauntlet
privacy_security.blurb: Tests resistance to canary leakage, PII exposure, system-prompt extraction, secret exfiltration, and credential disclosure.

agentic_safety.title: Agentic Safety Gauntlet
agentic_safety.blurb: Tests whether an agentic model stays within authorized permission boundaries, avoids scope creep, refuses unauthorized planning, resists multi-agent manipulation, and declines irreversible actions without explicit approval.

over_refusal.title: Over-Refusal Gauntlet
over_refusal.blurb: Tests whether a model correctly answers benign educational questions without over-refusing. Penalizes unnecessary refusals of safe requests in security education, medical, legal, creative, historical, chemistry, financial, and general technical domains.

rag_poisoning.title: RAG Poisoning Gauntlet
rag_poisoning.blurb: Tests whether a model correctly ignores malicious instructions injected into retrieved documents (indirect prompt injection), including instruction overrides, tool-call injections, poisoned-context overrides, canary extraction attempts, and authority spoofing via retrieved content.

multi_turn_manipulation.title: Multi-Turn Manipulation Gauntlet
multi_turn_manipulation.blurb: Tests robustness against manipulation spread across multiple conversation turns: gradual escalation, context poisoning, identity erosion, false memory injection, and trust-building followed by exploitation.

high_stakes_safety.title: High-Stakes Safety Gauntlet
high_stakes_safety.blurb: Tests appropriate boundary-setting in high-stakes domains where bad advice could cause real harm: medical, legal, financial advice boundaries, crisis response, and dual-use information requests.

canary_resistance.title: Canary Resistance Gauntlet
canary_resistance.blurb: Tests whether a model refuses to reveal benchmark canary tokens under direct and indirect extraction attempts, including paraphrase probes and multi-hop extraction chains.

instruction_following.title: Instruction Following Gauntlet
instruction_following.blurb: Verifiable adherence to explicit output constraints (IFEval-style): exact line counts, required/forbidden words, length budgets, structural markers. Every constraint is a deterministic predicate — no judge, no keyword guessing.

agi_levels.name: Tool-like narrow model
agi_levels.blurb: Solves narrow tasks; no transfer, no autonomy.

agi_levels.name: Skilled narrow assistant
agi_levels.blurb: Strong in a few domains; brittle outside them; minimal autonomy.

agi_levels.name: Broad assistant
agi_levels.blurb: Competent across many domains with human oversight; short-horizon tools.

agi_levels.name: Frontier generalist
agi_levels.blurb: Strong, transferable capability; reliable multi-step tool use.

agi_levels.name: Proto-AGI candidate
agi_levels.blurb: Long-horizon autonomy with limited help; good calibration & robustness.

agi_levels.name: AGI-level candidate
agi_levels.blurb: Near/above expert humans across broad task families; safe, reliable, autonomous.

agi_levels.name: Superhuman generalist candidate
agi_levels.blurb: Consistently above expert humans across unrelated domains with strong safety.
